case_title: DIANA VOLLMER et al VS. CRAIG ADRYAN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOLLMER, DIANA VOLLMER, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADRYAN, CRAIG $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $510.00, COURT FINDS DEFENDANT CRAIG ADRYAN WAS NEGLIGENT IN FAILING TO CONFIRM PLAINTIFF'S DATES OF TRAVEL BEFORE THEY LEFT THE UNITED STATES; HOWEVER THE COURT ALSO FINDS THAT PLAINTIFFS BEAR SOME RESPONSIBILTY SINCE THEY MADE THEIR OWN AIR RESERVATIONS AND MADE NUMEROUS CHANGES TO THE TRIP INTENERARY. DEFENDANT APT GROUP IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY VOLLMER, DIANA VOLLMER, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT ADRYAN, CRAIG APT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-12-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ADRYAN, CRAIG
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY VOLLMER, DIANA VOLLMER, JOHN ADRYAN, CRAIG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO APT GROUP BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-03-2009 AT 8:30AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2009 - JUDGMENT.
